main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'excessive residual SBS... osmotic imbalance' matches SBS no-purgado anchor

key_signals.justification: C2: 6 signals: sulfito 8.5, ORP -120/-180, rechazo 85.3, cond 850, caudal 220, dP

alternatives.justification: C3: 2 alts (biofouling SRB, cartridge SBS) - cartridge es subtipo no alternativa real

recommended_action.justification: C4: flush permeado 2h hasta sulfito<1 mg/L - matches gold sin CIP, con criterios

requested_data.justification: C5: 3 anchors (sulfito feed, restart conditions, agua bruta protocol update)

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit: sulfito feed<1 mg/L + flush sin mejora <200 µS/cm 4h -> daño
